revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月廿二]][[zh:四月廿二]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 22|qq=April 22}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|qid=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku|1=Tenryaku}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|947|en|947|qid=Q24333|lt=947 AD|1=947}} {{ill|May 15|en|May 15|qid=Q2562|lt=May 15|1=May 15}} ) – The era was changed from {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|qid=Q1327340|lt=Tenkyo|1=Tengyō}} to Tenryaku. * {{ill|Einin|en|Einin|qid=Q1327307|lt=Einin|1=Einin}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1293|en|1293|qid=Q5557|lt=1293 AD|1=1293}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|qid=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}} ) – During the {{ill|Heizenmon Rebellion|ja|平禅門の乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heizenmon Rebellion|1=Hei Zenmon Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483457}} , a retainer of the Hōjō Tokusō—who wielded actual power in the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} —namely {{ill|Taira Yoritsuna|ja|平頼綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Yoritsuna|1=Taira no Yoritsuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483787}} , was executed. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1583|en|1583|qid=Q6726|lt=1583 AD|1=1583}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|qid=Q2619|lt=June 12|1=June 12}} ) – In the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|en|Battle of Shizugatake|qid=Q225562|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|1=Battle of Shizugatake}} , {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , who had been aligned with {{ill|Shibata Katsuie|en|Shibata Katsuie|qid=Q707587|lt=Shibata Katsuie|1=Shibata Katsuie}} , surrendered to {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q187550}} , and subsequently advanced as the vanguard toward Kita-no-Shō in Fukui. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1818|en|1818|qid=Q6964|lt=1818 AD|1=1818}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}} ) – With the accession of {{ill|Emperor Ninkō|en|Emperor Ninkō|qid=Q312351|lt=Nintoku Tennō|1=Emperor Ninkō}} , the era was changed from {{ill|Culture|en|Culture|qid=Q11042|lt=Bunka|1=Culture}} to Bunsei. * Bunsei 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1823|en|1823|qid=Q6988|lt=1823 AD|1=1823}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|qid=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}} ) – The Chiyoda Incident occurred at the Nishi-no-maru of {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|qid=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle|1=Edo Castle}} . == Births == * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1069086}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|qid=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu|1=Jianwu}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1334|en|1334|qid=Q6007|lt=1334 AD|1=1334}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Sukō|en|Emperor Sukō|qid=Q471888|lt=Sukō Tennō|1=Emperor Sukō}} , the 3rd Emperor of the Northern Court (d. {{ill|1398|en|1398|qid=Q6416|lt=1398 AD|1=1398}} ). * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1534|en|1534|qid=Q6447|lt=1534 AD|1=1534}} {{ill|June 3|en|June 3|qid=Q2623|lt=June 3|1=June 3}} ) – {{ill|Hosokawa Yūsai|ja|細川幽斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Yūsai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 細川藤孝|1=Hosokawa Fujitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1207509}} (also known as Fujitak, 藤孝), a military commander and poet <ref>{{Kotobank|細川幽斎|qq=}} </ref> (d. {{ill|1610|en|1610|qid=Q6765|lt=1610 AD|1=1610}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 9th Year (Leap April) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|qid=Q7612|lt=1838 AD|1=1838}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|qid=Q2612|lt=June 14|1=June 14}} ) – {{ill|Yamagata Aritomo|en|Yamagata Aritomo|qid=Q297636|lt=Yamagata Aritomo|1=Yamagata Aritomo}} , the 3rd and 9th Prime Minister of Japan (d. {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922 AD|1=1922}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|21|4|23|3|22|5|4|0422|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ar:April 22 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿二]]
